sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114392" key="xoopo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χοο-πότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114392.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who drinks whole</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χόες,</foreign> of Dionysus, Possis <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
